description_long: This is a two-story urban house with a steeply pitched gable roof covered in dark, weathered tiles. The front facade features two vertically aligned windows with arched tops and a single entry door, accessed by a small set of steps. The exterior walls are finished in a muted gray, with the rear and side extensions clad in a diamond-patterned material, likely slate or tile. A single brick chimney rises from the roof, and a skylight is visible on one side of the roof. The rear of the house includes a modern extension with a flat roof and additional window, contrasting with the traditional main structure. The overall design is compact and functional, suitable for dense urban neighborhoods.
description: A compact two-story urban house with a steep gable roof, gray facade, arched windows, and a rear modern extension. Features include a brick chimney, skylight, and diamond-patterned side cladding.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entry door, two arched windows, and the steep gable roof with a chimney.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the diamond-patterned cladding and the side of the rear extension with a flat roof.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the modern extension with a flat roof, a skylight, and a mix of brick and gray wall finishes.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the uninterrupted diamond-patterned cladding and the rear extension's side.
attribute_entryway_design: Single door with small steps, no porch, simple and functional design
